log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Aetherborn — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:14+4=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Aetherborn — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Aetherborn — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 15] HIT! 16 damage. Aetherborn — Unarmored Caster HP: 51/67
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 15] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 15] HIT! 17 damage. Aetherborn — Unarmored Caster HP: 34/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Aetherborn — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 34/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:11+4=15 vs DC 16] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:7+4=11 vs DC 16] FAIL. Still paralyzed.
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Aetherborn — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 34/67 | AC: 15 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hold Person. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 16] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 4 ══

ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:3+4=7 vs DC 16] FAIL! 5 psychic damage. HP: 173/178
